A few good reasons
to stay longer

Small offers for the unhurried, the spontaneous and the midweek wanderers. Every one booked straight with the house — the price you see is the price you pay.

stay 3, pay 2

Book three nights or more and the third is on the house — any room, any season.

Hear the next offer first

Our best rates rarely last a week. Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment one opens.

Join the listSee the rooms
MMarmalade House

A five-room guesthouse in a restored 1873 parsonage in Prince Albert, in the heart of the Karoo. Sunny rooms, a fig garden, and very good breakfast.

The house

Stay
Book a roomGetting hereFAQ
Notes from the kitchen

Open dates, the odd recipe, and when the figs are ripe. Once a month, never more.
